title: Truecaller faces mounting pressures as its growth matures
summary: Truecaller, the Indian caller identification platform, faces slowing growth as it matures in its core market. The company is shifting toward subscription services, business-focused offerings, and new features to sustain momentum and expand internationally beyond India. This strategy reflects the challenge mature platforms face in emerging markets when seeking diversified revenue streams.
content: As growth slows, Truecaller is leaning on subscriptions, business services, and new features to sustain momentum beyond India.

zh.title: Truecaller 面临增长成熟带来的巨大压力
zh.summary: 印度来电识别平台 Truecaller 在其核心市场趋于成熟的情况下面临增长放缓。该公司正在转向订阅服务、面向企业的产品和新功能，以保持势头并扩大国际业务。这一战略反映了成熟平台在新兴市场中寻求多元化收入流时面临的挑战。
